summary: Completed comprehensive testing of InstaRoadTax application - car insurance and road tax renewal platform for Etiqa Takaful Malaysia. Tested both backend APIs and frontend UI with successful integration.

minor_issues.issue: File upload returns 400 error during multipart form data submission
minor_issues.impact: Document upload feature may not work properly

ui_bugs.issue: Select dropdown options sometimes have overlay interception issues during automated testing
ui_bugs.note: May be test-specific issue, manual testing shows dropdowns work

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, how-it-works, testimonials)
Navigation links work (Get Quote button, Admin link)
Multi-step quote form navigation (4 steps: Vehicle Info, Owner Info, Documents, Review)
Backend API endpoints - 14/15 tests passed (93.3% success rate)
Admin dashboard shows proper stats and data integration
Admin navigation between Dashboard, Orders, and Payments tabs
All CRUD operations for orders and payments
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix file upload endpoint (/api/upload) - currently returns 400 error. The issue appears to be with multipart form data handling. All other functionality is working excellently.
